description: Testing initial display states of upload component

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of upload item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank with correct place holder
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of upload CSV item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank with correct place holder
...

description: Testing file name handling with various characters

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check name of CSV file after Selected CSV file when it has:
+ Max lenght
+ Special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#", "&", "$"...
+ Number & Alphabet characters (Upper/Lower case)
+ Japanese characters  (Half/Full-width)
+ Unicode characters
+ Spaces
+ SQL injection
+ HTML code
expected_result:
+ Display correctly as original CSV file name with correct format
+ Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file capacity is:
+ Min size/Min size +1
+ Max size/Max size -1
expected_result: Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file capacity is:
+ Min size - 1
+ Max size + 1
+ Size = 0 bytes
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has:
+ Number of Columns < Number of Min value
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has:
+ Number of Columns > Number of Max value
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has:
+ Without header line
+ All column headers are blank
+ Any header is blank
+ Incorrect header
+ File only contain header
+ Duplicate header
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has:
+ Blank row on Top
+ Blank row is any row
+ Blank row on Bottom
expected_result: Can upload successfully or display error message (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has Number of rows:
+ <Number of Max value
+ = > Number of  Max value
expected_result: Can upload successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has Number of rows:
+ > Number of  Max value
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has:
+ Duplicate rows
+ Duplicate value of normal column
+ Duplicate value of unique column
expected_result: Can upload successfully with overwrite value or display error message (Base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when file content has:
+ Null
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check validate of each column in file
expected_result: Validate same as checklist of [Input item]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when:
+ Upload file read only
expected_result: Process successfully as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check Upload operation when:
+ Upload file can write
expected_result: Process successfully as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when upload a file which has type is:
+ .csv / .CSV
+ .tsv /.TSV
expected_result: Can upload successfully with supported file types

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when upload a file which has type is:
+ Image
+ Video 
+ Document
+ Change type from abnormal to normal 
+ Change type from normal to abnormal
expected_result: Display correct error message

description: Testing file upload from various sources

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when location of CSV file is:
+ Upload from PC
+ Drag&Drop between folders on PC
+ Upload from shared folder
+ Upload from External device (USB, Memory card...)
+ Read only Forder
expected_result:
Always display correctly:
+ CSV file path
+ File icon thumnail
and upload successfully.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when path file is:
+ Long path (max lenght)
+ Includes special characters
+ Includes Unicode characters
+ Includes half-width characters
+ Includes full-width characters
expected_result:
Always display correctly:
+ CSV file path
+ File icon thumnail
and upload successfully.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and operation when Number of upload file is:
+ 0 file upload
expected_result: Upload button is not enabled

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and upload operation when:
+ upload only 1 file
+ Upload multi files at the same time
+ Upload multi files which has same name and same content 
+ Upload multi files which has same name only
+ Upload multi files which has same content only
+ Upload duplicate file with an uploaded file
+ Upload continuously
expected_result: Process successfully or display error message (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and upload operation when:
+ Click Upload button multiple times
expected_result: Process successfully or display error message (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display and upload operation when:
+ Many users upload the same file
expected_result: Process successfully or display error message (base on spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: While uploading file, Disconect network
expected_result: Display correct error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when upload a file which has delimiter is:
+ Apostrophes ('')
+ Quote ("")
+ Other character
+ Not use
expected_result: Upload file successfully or Display correct error message base on supported file format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when upload a file which has Separater is:
+ Tab
+ Comma
+ Semicolon
+ Other character
expected_result: Upload file successfully or Display correct error message base on supported file format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when upload a file which has Endcoding is:
+ Unicode UTF-8
+ UTF-16
+ Shift JIS 
+ zipcode
expected_result: Upload file successfully or Display correct error message base on supported file format
